title: Shiny Gible from PokeRogue
description: This texture pack retextures Cobblemon's normal shiny Gible into PokeRogue's blue star Shiny Gible (because it is my favorite one)
body:
This is a resource pack that changes the shiny textures on the Gible line for Cobblemon. 
The shiny texture in this pack is based off of the Blue Star shinies from PokeRogue, and does include an updated shiny Mega Garchomp based off the texture used by [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)
